nodes.title: SGA Service Internship
nodes.description: Optional internship course for elected SGA representatives and officers. Coursework focuses on integrating insights from SGA service into other components of the college experience. Prerequisite: Instructor Permission.
nodes.other_requirements: Instructor Permission. SGA Reps and Officers only.

nodes.title: StudyCATS
nodes.description: StudyCATS program course including time management, study skills, and support resources. Prerequisite: StudyCATS participants.
